# Place the SMPL-Anthropometry repository here.
#
# Run once:
#   git clone https://github.com/DavidBoja/SMPL-Anthropometry third_party/SMPL-Anthropometry
#
# The MeasurementEngine will automatically add this directory to sys.path
# so that `from measure import MeasureBody` works at runtime.
#
# Additionally, copy the SMPL-X model data files into:
#   third_party/SMPL-Anthropometry/data/smplx/
#       SMPLX_MALE.pkl
#       SMPLX_FEMALE.pkl
#       SMPLX_NEUTRAL.pkl
#
# (These are the .pkl versions, separate from the .npz files used by smplx.)
